ScionHealth provides equal employment opportunity for all applicants and employees. ScionHealth will not discriminate or tolerate discrimination against employees or applicants based upon race, color, religion, gender, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, military duty, citizenship, marital status, disability, veteran's status or any other basis protected by federal, state or local law. Drug Free Workplace.

You must select a country and a zip/postal code before selecting a distance.

To view a list of relevant site criteria, select a country and a zip/postal code, then specify a distance. The system will display a list of sites available within the selected distance.The following list displays the {0} closest sites within {1} {2} of the selected zip/postal code.

Select the box next to the sites where you would like to apply for a job to verify if there are any positions available.To locate a site on a map, click the relevant site name.
